name: Guotai Asset Management Co - Hang Seng Hong Kong  Stock Connect Index Fund
summary: Guotai Asset Management Co - Hang Seng Hong Kong  Stock Connect Index Fund is a fund managed by Guotai Asset Management that tracks the Hang Seng Hong Kong Stock Connect Index. The fund invests in Hong Kong-listed stocks that are eligible for trading through the Stock Connect program, allowing mainland Chinese investors access to the Hong Kong stock market.
